---
title: "Mary Eleanora Sunderland"
---

## Mary Eleanora Sunderland

**Dates:** (1853/4-26 July 1877)

### Description

member of the Gosling Society

### Biography

A Gosling as Iceberg 1867-9, she lived at Swarthdale, Ulverston, Lancs, daughter of Commander George Henry Carleton Sunderland RN (1814-1876)  and his wife Margaret (d. 1860) daughter of Lt-Col Story RA [Bardsley, <i>Chronicles of Ulverston</i>]  She was first cousin to Mary Anderson Morshead, their mothers being sisters.

### Letters

- Letter from Nov 20th [1868]
- Letter from July 1st [1868]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
